en: You need to know these prepositions in English I'm going to go fast are you ready Married
ko: 영어에서 이 전치사들을 알아야 해 빠르게 갈 거야 준비됐어? Married

en: to I'm married to Will Proud of I'm so proud of you
ko: to 나는 Will과 결혼했어 Proud of 너무 자랑스러워

en: Interested in she's interested in baseball Good or bad at
ko: Interested in 그녀는 야구에 관심이 있어 Good이나 bad at

en: my dad's good at cooking Pay for I'll pay for dinner
ko: 우리 아빠는 요리를 잘해 Pay for 내가 저녁 살게

en: Depend on we might go for a picnic It depends on the weather Excited
ko: Depend on 소풍 갈 수도 있어 날씨에 달려 있어 Excited

en: about I'm really excited about my trip to Japan Wrong with what's
ko: about 일본 여행이 정말 기대돼 Wrong with what's

en: Aware of Imogen's aware of the problem Belong to who does this
ko: Aware of Imogen은 그 문제를 알고 있어 Belong to 이거 누구

en: jacket belong to Laugh at don't laugh at me Listen to are you
ko: 재킷이야? Laugh at 나 놀리지 마 Listen to 너

en: listening to me Which of those prepositions do you use accurately Let me know in the comments
ko: 내 말 듣고 있어? 이 전치사들 중 어떤 걸 정확하게 쓰고 있어? 댓글로 알려줘
